station_address: Plot No 44, R.A. Kidwai Marg, near Ajhad Nagar, Wadala West, Wadala, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400031
text: I had a very good experience at this petrol pump. The staff were polite, efficient, and quick with their service. The fueling area was clean and well-organized, and safety measures were clearly being followed. I also appreciated the digital payment options and the availability of air and water facilities. Keep up the good work!

text:
They seem honest, filling correct amount of diesel of good quality. Big queue for CNG but no wait usually for diesel and petrol. I am a regular here.
Edit: got online Diesel PUC done here after a lot of search as no-one else was ready with it.

text: It has almost all services like CNG,PETROL, DIESEL, Oil changing, Free air, online PUC available at Rs 42, And an ICICI LOMBARD INSURANCE counter for your motor vehicles insurance. Online payment is accepted here. And overall service is good here.
